title: MCBR Pixelmon - Mobile
description: Embark on the ultimate Pixelmon adventure, providing the best possible experience and performance in the Pixelmon world.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18151a71ab32fd82ea3292e11af46bbdf58d3658_0.webp)


Welcome to Minecraft Brazil Pixelmon! Our server offers a unique experience! Come and have hours of fun playing the real Pixelmon, capturing the true essence of gaming.

# What our modpack specifically does:

Our modpack was designed specifically for those with low-power computers. It includes the Pixelmon mod, which offers an exciting adventure and an extensive journey to explore.

# Why you should download our modpack:

- Performance Boost: Say farewell to lag and slowdowns. Our modpack incorporates essential performance mods such as Embeddium and Starlight, guaranteeing a smoother and more enjoyable Pixelmon gameplay experience.

- Immersive Graphics: Enhance your world by installing shaders. Experience stunning visuals and fully immerse yourself in the Pixelmon universe like never before.

# What you need to know before downloading:

Our modpack is focused on enhancing your adventure and performance with Pixelmon. Staying true to the core Pixelmon gameplay, it offers an improved experience with a more rewarding progression system. Every achievement in the Pixelmon world will be a significant milestone.

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
